summary: NanoMed loyihasidagi barcha bug'lar va to'liqlanmagan ishlar yakunlandi: 7 ta bug tuzatildi (User import, Appointment relationships, TimeSlotPicker real data, schedule_id fix, YYYY-MM-DD format, HMAC security, Vercel handler). Yangi /api/schedules endpoint qo'shildi, real booking oqimi to'liq ishlaydi, QueueTracker integratsiya qilindi.
